ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family embracing. The sequence starts with arms slightly out to the side, then moves to an embracing posture, and finally returns to a relaxed pose.  The arms move symmetrically for a balanced look. The slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions add to the naturalness of the movement.

frames.beat: arms open slightly, ready for a hug
both arms sweep in for a warm, symmetrical embrace
arms relax outwards after the loving embrace
